calendar.matters:
Motion To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Apr-19-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Jaime L. Dupree; 415-339-3840; Futterman Dupree Dodd Croley Maier LLP; appearing via Zoom for plaintiff.
Hassan Najafi; 510-455-1867; defendant in pro per appearing in person.

Mr. Najafi contests the courts tentative ruling. The court informs Mr. Najaffi that the courts role is limited regarding arbitration award issues. Argued. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER MAJOR CHABOT PARTNERS, L.P.'S MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD is GRANTED.

Judge: Charles F. Haines ; Clerk: L. Young ; Not Reported. (D501)

Motion To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Mar-28-2024 Continued To Apr-19-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

PETITIONER MAJOR CHABOT PARTNERS, L.P.'S MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD is continued to April 19, 2024 on Court's own motion.

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)
